data.name: MILK ME DARLING: THE ANALIZED BREAST FRIEND
data.detailed_description:
MILK ME DARLING: THE ANALIZED BREAST FRIEND (all characters are 18+ and no character get hurt in this video game), a double penetration sex simulation game, in every sex position there is anal and vaginal sex you can do with darling until you cum inside darling vagina or ass, in this new MILK ME DARLING game there are many new costumes for darling that you can choose, your goal is creampie your thirsty darling

here are you can do in the game

1. have sex with cute and beautifull darlings

2. you can milk darlings boobs and big tits during have sex

3. you can creampie your darlings

4. 4x camera zoom during sex scene

5. you can costumize your darling outfit before having sex with her, also change darlings outfit is possible during have sex

6. you can add hair accessories for your darlings like flower hairpin, butterfly hairpin, cat ears headband, maid headband and many more

7. you can choose what kind of choker for your darlings, there are 3 choker you can choose

8. you can swap darling bikini, corset, choker, upper arms accessories, body stocking, hair pin, separately during darling DP sex section

data.short_description: MILK ME DARLING: THE ANALIZED BREAST FRIEND (all characters are 18+ and no character get hurt in this video game), a double penetration sex simulation game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: windows 7 64 bit
  • 處理器: 2.5+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows 10 or 11 64 bit
  • 處理器: 3 GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Vulkan compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
